scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others --names "BACKEND,FRONTEND" --prefix-colors "blue,green" "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix backend && npm run build --prefix frontend
scripts.bump:patch: npm version patch && node -e "const v=require('./package.json').version,fs=require('fs');['backend','frontend'].forEach(p=>{const f=`${p}/package.json`,j=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(f));j.version=v;fs.writeFileSync(f,JSON.stringify(j,null,2)+'\n')})" && git add backend/package.json frontend/package.json && git commit --amend --no-edit && git push --follow-tags
scripts.bump:minor: npm version minor && node -e "const v=require('./package.json').version,fs=require('fs');['backend','frontend'].forEach(p=>{const f=`${p}/package.json`,j=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(f));j.version=v;fs.writeFileSync(f,JSON.stringify(j,null,2)+'\n')})" && git add backend/package.json frontend/package.json && git commit --amend --no-edit && git push --follow-tags
scripts.bump:major: npm version major && node -e "const v=require('./package.json').version,fs=require('fs');['backend','frontend'].forEach(p=>{const f=`${p}/package.json`,j=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(f));j.version=v;fs.writeFileSync(f,JSON.stringify(j,null,2)+'\n')})" && git add backend/package.json frontend/package.json && git commit --amend --no-edit && git push --follow-tags
